name: Ace of Cups
short_upright: An opening of the heart and the arrival of feeling. New love, creative emotion, or a wellspring of compassion ready to overflow.
short_reversed: Feelings dammed up or turned away. Emotional walls, self-protection, or a heart that can't quite let what's offered land.

name: Two of Cups
short_upright: Two hearts meet as equals and something real takes shape between them. A connection built on mutual respect, attraction, or the simple recognition of a kindred soul.
short_reversed: A bond out of balance or crossed wires between two people. Resentment, withdrawal, or the slow drift that follows when care stops flowing both ways.

name: Three of Cups
short_upright: A gathering of friends and the warmth of shared joy. Milestones honored together, creative collaboration, or simply the pleasure of being among your people.
short_reversed: The social circle sours or closes you out. Gossip, cliques, overindulgence, or the quiet ache of feeling outside the group you once belonged to.

name: Four of Cups
short_upright: A restless discontent sets in despite having enough. Boredom, introspection, or the stubborn feeling that something is missing even when good things are already being offered.
short_reversed: The fog of apathy lifts and your eyes open again. Renewed interest, acceptance of what is, or the willingness to reach for the cup you'd been ignoring.

name: Five of Cups
short_upright: Grief pulls your gaze toward what's been spilled. Loss, regret, or disappointment that makes it hard to notice the cups still standing behind you.
short_reversed: The weight of sorrow begins to ease and perspective returns. Forgiveness, healing, or turning at last to see what remains and can still be carried forward.

name: Six of Cups
short_upright: A softening into memory and the sweetness of simpler times. Reunions, childhood ties, or the gentle gift of kindness offered without agenda.
short_reversed: Nostalgia curdles into a refusal to grow up or let go. Clinging to what was, idealizing the past, or finally releasing an old attachment to step into the present.

name: Seven of Cups
short_upright: Too many tempting options shimmer in the air at once. Imagination runs rich, but fantasy and wishful thinking can blur what's actually worth pursuing.
short_reversed: The mist clears and a real choice becomes possible. Priorities snap into focus, illusions fall away, and one cup is finally lifted from the shelf.

name: Eight of Cups
short_upright: Turning your back on something that no longer nourishes you. A quiet, deliberate departure in search of deeper meaning, even when the life behind you still looks fine on paper.
short_reversed: Hesitation at the threshold of leaving. Either clinging to what's already hollow, or attempting to return to something you've genuinely outgrown.

name: Nine of Cups
short_upright: The emotional wish granted and savored. Contentment, pride in what you've built, and the simple pleasure of having enough of what you actually wanted.
short_reversed: Satisfaction that doesn't quite satisfy. Smugness, hollow pleasures, or a wish fulfilled that turns out not to have been the real one after all.

name: Ten of Cups
short_upright: The rainbow arcs over a life shared with those you love. Family, belonging, and the deep, ordinary happiness of emotional bonds that hold.
short_reversed: The picture of togetherness cracks along its seams. Family strain, values out of alignment, or a happy facade hiding tensions underneath.

name: Page of Cups
short_upright: A small, surprising offering from the inner world. A creative nudge, an intuitive hunch, or a tender feeling that arrives with the openness of a child.
short_reversed: The soft voice sulks or sours. Emotional immaturity, moodiness, creative blockage, or retreating into fantasy rather than feeling what's actually there.

name: Knight of Cups
short_upright: The heart's envoy rides in with a cup held high. Romance, artistic inspiration, and the graceful pursuit of what beauty and feeling call you toward.
short_reversed: The romantic gesture rings hollow or tips into drama. Idealism untethered from reality, moodiness, or charm deployed in place of honesty.

name: Queen of Cups
short_upright: Deep feeling held with steady grace. Intuitive, empathic, and nurturing without losing herself, she reads the currents of the heart and responds with care.
short_reversed: The waters overflow their banks. Emotional overwhelm, absorbing others' feelings at your own expense, or caretaking that slides into codependence.

name: King of Cups
short_upright: Feeling mastered without being denied. Compassionate leadership, steadiness under pressure, and the wisdom to hold strong emotion without being tossed by it.
short_reversed: The calm surface hides turbulent depths. Suppressed feeling that erupts unpredictably, moodiness, or emotional leverage used to control those nearby.
